name: Base Box Detector RDP V1 (Pattern)
description: RDP-anchored base box detector. Builds consolidation boxes from RDP swing highs/lows and scores tightness, touch quality, flatness, pivot alternation, duration, and recency.
author: system

tunable_params.label: RDP Epsilon (%)
tunable_params.description: RDP sensitivity for swing extraction used to anchor the base box.

tunable_params.label: Base Lookbacks CSV
tunable_params.description: Comma-separated window sizes to test as candidate base durations.

tunable_params.label: Min Base Bars
tunable_params.description: Minimum bars for a base window.

tunable_params.label: Max Base Range (%)
tunable_params.description: Maximum allowed high-low box range as % of box ceiling.

tunable_params.label: Top Touch Tolerance (%)
tunable_params.description: How close RDP highs must be to box ceiling to count as top touches.

tunable_params.label: Bottom Touch Tolerance (%)
tunable_params.description: How close RDP lows must be to box floor to count as bottom touches.

tunable_params.label: Min Total RDP Pivots
tunable_params.description: Minimum total RDP pivots required inside the base window.

tunable_params.label: Min Pivot Switches
tunable_params.description: Minimum HIGH/LOW alternations within the candidate window.

tunable_params.label: Max Slope (%/bar)
tunable_params.description: Max normalized close slope allowed for a flat base.

tunable_params.label: Max Scan Bars
tunable_params.description: How far back to search for bases.

tunable_params.label: Breakout Context (%)
tunable_params.description: Optional context flag only: did price ever close above this level after base.

tunable_params.label: Ceiling Escape (%)
tunable_params.description: How far above ceiling current price can be and still count as near/inside base context.

tunable_params.label: Floor Escape (%)
tunable_params.description: How far below floor current price can be and still count as near/inside base context.

tunable_params.label: Overlap Threshold
tunable_params.description: Used to deduplicate overlapping box windows.
